name: nodejs-self-contained-demo
description: Self-contained Node.js application demo using pkg

scripts.test: node server.js & sleep 5 && curl http://localhost:3000/health && pkill -f server.js
scripts.build:all: npm run clean && npm run build:windows && npm run build:linux && npm run build:macos
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run package:zip
scripts.package:zip: cd dist/windows && zip -r ../myapp-windows-x64.zip myapp.exe && cd ../linux && tar -czf ../myapp-linux-x64.tar.gz myapp && cd ../macos && zip -r ../myapp-macos-x64.zip myapp

author: Your Name
